title: Hair Care and Beauty Services
content:
Hair Care and Beauty Services

About Hair Care and Beauty Services Program

What is the Hair Care and Beauty Services Program?

It is an associate degree program that brings a qualified workforce to the sector, who have gained professional qualifications in line with the ever-developing and renewed needs of the care and beauty sector, who understand work ethics and business discipline, and who can follow and apply technological developments. Hair Care and Beauty Services program is one of the programs of Üsküdar University Vocational School of Health Services, which has many branches in which you can specialize, is open to development and has a dynamic structure.

What are the Lessons Learned in the Hair Care and Beauty Services Program?

In addition to theoretical education, the program includes practical courses and summer internships. Positive Psychology and Communication, which supports communication skills in business life, especially in addition to vocational courses such as skin care applications, make-up applications, epilation and depilation, body care applications, hand, foot and nail care, hair care and making, hair styling, coloring and hair cutting, which are included in our curriculum. We aim to ensure that our students graduate well-equipped with courses such as Skills and University Culture.

What are the Working Areas of Hair Care and Beauty Services Graduates?

Our graduates who successfully complete the Hair Care and Beauty Services program have employment opportunities in different fields. When you graduate from the program;

• In medical aesthetics and beauty units of hospitals and medical centers,

• In beauty salons and centers,

• In men's or women's hairdressing salons,

• In therapy and care centers,

• On TV channels,

• In theater halls,

• In cosmetic companies,

• Can work as a trainer in public institutions and organizations.

• Additionally, graduates of the Hair care and beauty services program can open their own businesses.

It is possible to transfer from the Hair Care and Beauty Services Program to the Chemistry Undergraduate Program with the Vertical Transfer Exam.

What are the characteristics that a hair care and beauty services professional should have?

High creativity, advanced aesthetics, strong human relations, talent in sales and marketing, and following new technologies are among the main characteristics required in this profession.
